Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Blue]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Blue is a source of concern for Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Blue is a character capable of matching Orthos in strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Blue can recover in the way of Heralds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Blue is referred to as Little Blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Blue is a Herald and a spirit of pure madra.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — Blue is an object that was being calibrated by the Lichborn woman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — Blue is a Divine Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — Blue is a character who gives orders to Green.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — Blue uses telekinesis to enter the Blue Divine Titan.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
